hardGates: Clone, content-and-design adaptation, and post-approval updates run as separate loops with explicit authority
Astro 7, Vite 8, Alpine integration 1, Node 22, and native agent server state/logging are validated
The clone uses visible reference copy and downloaded reference media, never supplied Markdown or final brand assets
The clone is approved explicitly before any sitemap route or approved content is adapted
Every route in content/overview.md is implemented during adaptation
Reference forensics and paired state coverage are locked before clone implementation
Every clone section has a complete recursive DOM/computed-style/behavior spec with no unresolved evidence before builder dispatch
Only the primary and explicitly listed referencePages are cloned; unlisted reference pages are not crawled
Every approved Markdown text block is mapped and proven rendered during adaptation without invented factual claims
Final colors, typography, radii, spacing, media treatment, and motion derive from reference plus supplied brand rather than model house style
Astro check and production build pass
No uncaught browser or console errors
No serious or critical accessibility violations
No horizontal overflow at configured viewports
Screenshots, videos, traces, and source dumps are stored only under ignored artifacts/ folders
Canonical settled and section captures are nonblank and were captured after a scroll sweep triggered reveal and lazy-load behavior
Every inventoried reference section has paired 1920px and 390px viewport evidence
Primary desktop geometry matches the reference at 1920px, with 1440px as a secondary desktop check
Desktop and mobile navigation match the reference structure, geometry, open/closed states, and motion
Required hover, focus, loading, scrolling, and navigation states work
Every visible transition and animation is fluid, interruption-safe, and has reduced-motion behavior
Every clone media requirement uses a downloaded local reference asset with no hotlinks
Every shipping media requirement has an integrated generated or royalty-free replacement with provenance
Temporary clone routes and reference media are absent before shipping
